case_title: TAMMY NG ET AL VS. ELLEN STEVENS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED MAR-19-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANEATIS, JENNY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED MAR-19-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, ELLEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, TAMMY NG, STEPHANIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEVENS, ELLEN MANEATIS, JENNY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NG, TAMMY NG, STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, ELLEN MANEATIS, JENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - ELLEN STEVENS; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-25-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
